marketing.premiumAnnualDesc: Londoloza kakhulu uma ukhokhiswa minyaka yonke.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Kukhokhiswa kusengaphambili. Khansela noma kunini. Azikho izimali ezifihliwe.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (amaphakheji edatha eSIM)
mobile.subtitle: Engeza idatha yomhlaba wonke ukuze iChatforia iqhubeke isebenza ngisho naphandle kwe-Wi-Fi. Amanani alungiswa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngokususelwa ezweni lakho nasemalini yakho.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Khetha iphakethe ledatha yomhlaba wonke elikhokhwa kanye ukuze i-Chatforia iqhubeke isebenza uma uhamba noma ukude ne-Wi-Fi.

features.throttle: Idatha esheshayo ehlangabezana nemigomo yokusetshenziswa ngokulinganayo kanye nokuphathwa kwenethiwekhi

disclaimer.devices: Amaphakethe edatha we-eSIM adinga idivayisi ehambisana ne-eSIM futhi evulekile. Ukutholakala kuyahluka ngokuya ngomodeli wocingo, umhlinzeki wenethiwekhi, kanye nezwe. Ukumbozwa kanye nezivinini kuyahluka ngokuya ngendawo.

compare.title: Qhathanisa amaphakheji edatha we-eSIM
compare.disclaimer: Ukusetshenziswa kwedatha yangempela kuncike endleleni osebenzisa ngayo i-Chatforia (izwi, ividiyo, imidiya, nezinye izinhlelo zokusebenza efonini yakho).

family.title: Umndeni we-Chatforia (idatha ekwabelwana ngayo)
family.subtitle: Yabelana ngenqwaba yedatha eyodwa nomndeni wakho. Ibhili elilodwa, ama-akhawunti amaningi e-Chatforia, ukumbozwa komhlaba wonke.

small.title: Umndeni Omncane
small.desc: Ihlanganisa ama-20 GB wedatha esabelwe esheshayo — ilungele abasebenzisi ababili kuya kwabathathu abasebenzisa kancane.

medium.title: Umndeni Ophakathi
medium.desc: Ihlanganisa ama-GB angu-40 edatha esabelwe esheshayo — ilungele amalungu asebenzayo angu-3–5.

large.title: Umndeni Omkhulu
large.desc: Ihlanganisa ama-80 GB edatha ekwabelwana ngayo esheshayo — yemindeni esebenzayo njalo eku-inthanethi.

feature.shared: Ibhodi ledatha ekwabelwana ngalo lomndeni wakho
feature.membersMore: Kuhle kumalungu asebenzayo angu-3 kuya kwangu-5
feature.fairUse: Kuncike kumgomo wokusetshenziswa okufanele nemikhawulo yasendaweni

family.disclaimer: Amaphakheji omndeni adala noma agcwalisa iphuli yedatha ekwabelwana ngayo. Ungamenywa futhi ususe amalungu noma kunini.
family.footnote: Amaphakethe omndeni ahlanganyela ichibi ledatha elilodwa kuzo zonke izikhawu ze-Chatforia ezixhunyiwe. Ukutholakala nemikhawulo kuncike ezweni lakho nasemithethweni yasendaweni.

why.title: Kungani abantu bethuthela ku-Chatforia
why.subtitle: I-Chatforia ikunikeza inombolo yocingo yangempela, ukuguqulela okuhlakaniphile, kanye nendlela ecacile yokuyeka izikhangiso uma usukulungele.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Izikhangiso ezilula ku-Mahhala, ukuthuthukisa okulula kwe-Plus uma usukulungele, namathuluzi e-Premium angahlinzekiwa yi-TextNow.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Uhlelo lokusebenza lwesimanje, umhlaba wonke -ukuklama okuqala, nokuhumusha okwakhelwe ngaphakathi esikhundleni sokudlulisela izingcingo kwesitayela sakudala.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs izinhlelo zokuxoxa
messengers.body: Thumela imiyalezo yamanombolo ucingo wangempela — hhayi abasebenzisi bezinye izinhlelo kuphela — nge-AI nesimo esakhelwe ngaphakathi. Kuhle uma uvela kwezinhlelo ezifana ne-TextFree noma i-TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Ukuqhathanisa kusekelwe olwazini olutholakala obala futhi kungashintsha ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Ezinye izinhlelo zokusebenza zokuthumela imiyalezo yamahhala ezifana ne-TextFree noma i-TextMe ngokuvamile ziyafana ne-TextNow.

free.a: Yebo. Uhlelo lwamahhala luqukethe inombolo ye-Chatforia, ukushaya izingcingo nokuthumela imiyalezo kunezikhangiso. Ungahlala ohlelweni lwamahhala isikhathi eside njengoba uthanda, noma uthuthukise ukuze ususe izikhangiso futhi uvule izici eziningi.

plusPremium.a: I-Plus isusa izikhangiso futhi yandise umlando wemilayezo yakho — ifanele ukusetshenziswa kwansuku zonke. I-Premium ingeza izilungiselelo ezengeziwe, amathuluzi e-AI wokubhala kabusha nokuphendula, kanye nokwesekwa okubalulekile kwabasebenzisi abasebenzisa kakhulu.

esim.a: I-Chatforia Mobile isebenzisa ukumbozwa kwe-eSIM emhlabeni wonke. Ukutholakala kuncike ezweni lakho nasemkhiqizweni wakho. Uzobona izinketho ezisekelwayo ngesikhathi sokuvula ngaphakathi kohlelo lokusebenza.

cancel.q: Ngingakhansela noma ngishintshe izinhlelo noma kunini?
cancel.a: Yebo. Ungaphatha noma ukhansele ukubhalisa kwakho ekhasini lokukhokha kuhlelo lokusebenza. Izinguquko ziqala ukusebenza ekupheleni kwesikhathi sakho samanje sokukhokha.

family.a: Ama-Family packs adala ichibi ledatha elabelwe ama-akhawunti amaningi e-Chatforia. Umuntu oyedwa ukhokha ibhili, futhi ungamema noma ususe amalungu futhi usethe imingcele kumuntu ngamunye.

iphutha.ukumema: Akwenzeki ukudala isimemo. Qiniseka ukuthi ungumnikazi womndeni bese uzama futhi.
iphutha.ukukhokha: Asikwazanga ukuqala ukukhokha uhlelo Lomndeni. Sicela uzame futhi.

ukukhokha.freePlanCopy: Usehlelo lwamahhala. Khuphula ukuze uvule izici eziningi.
ukukhokha.khanselaManjeUsizo: Ungaphatha noma ukhansele ukubhalisa kwakho ku-portal yokukhokha, noma ukhansele ngokushesha ngezansi.
ukukhokha.qinisekisaKhanselaManje: Ingabe uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukukhansela uhlelo lwakho ngokushesha? Lokhu ngeke kubuyiselwe emuva.
ukukhokha.cancelNowError: Akwenzeki ukukhansela uhlelo lwakho okwamanje. Sicela uzame futhi noma usebenzise Ukuphatha izinkokhelo.

none.title: Akukho umndeni osusethwe okwamanje
none.body: Ukuze udale i-Chatforia Family kanye nebhange ledatha elabelwe, qala uhlelo lomndeni.

idatha.incazelo: Wonke amalungu ayabelana ngaleli phuli. Sizokwazisa uma usondela emkhawulweni wakho.

ukumema.body: Thumela i-imeyili noma isixhumanisi ukumema umuntu ukuthi angene eqoqweni lwakho lwedatha yomndeni enabelwana ngayo.
ukumema.expiryHint: Leli khonkco liphelelwa yisikhathi ngemva kwezinsuku ezimbalwa. Ungahlala udala elisha.

join.title: Ungene emndenini
join.body: Umenyiwe ukuba ujoyine Umndeni we-Chatforia futhi wabelane ngenqwaba yedatha yabo.
join.success: Usejoyine lo mndeni. Manje wabelana ngenqwaba yedatha yabo.
join.error: Asikwazanga ukukwengeza kulomndeni. Isimemo singase singasebenzi noma siphelelwe yisikhathi.

randomChat.title: Ingxoxo Engahleliwe
randomChat.isihlokwana: Hlangana nomuntu omusha ngokushesha, noma ukhethe ukuxoxa noRia.
randomChat.incazelo: Qala ukuxoxa ungaziwa kuqala. Engeza umngane kamuva uma uzizwa ukhululekile.
randomChat.setAge: Seta ibanga lakho lobudala ku-Profile → Iminyaka ukuze uhlangane nabantu.
randomChat.hiddenUsernames: Amagama abasebenzisi afihlwe kuze kube bobabili bekhetha ukwengeza umngane.
randomChat.riaSeparate: Xoxa noRia noma yinini — ngokwehlukana nokuhlanganiswa kwabantu abangahleliwe.
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Sigcina kuphela ibanga lobudala (hhayi usuku lwakho lokuzalwa ngqo). Lokhu kusetshenziselwa ukugcina ukufanisa kwengxoxo engahleliwe kufanelekile. Ukuze ufaniswe nabantu (hhayi iRiaBot kuphela), setha ibanga lakho lobudala ku-Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Setha ibanga lakho lobudala ku-Profile → Age & Random Chat ukuze uhlangane nabantu.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Ukuze uhlangane nabantu (hhayi i-RiaBot kuphela), setha ibanga lakho lobudala ku-Settings → Age & Random Chat.

greetings.long1: Sawubona {{name}} 👋 Ngikhona lapha. Yini engqondweni yakho?
greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 🙂 Ufuna ukukhulula umoya, ubuze, noma nje ukuxoxa?
greetings.short2: Sawubona futhi {{name}} 👋 Kukhona okunye ofuna ukukwengeza?
greetings.short3: Ubuyile futhi, {{name}}? 😊 Ngitshele ukuthi yini engqondweni yakho.
greetings.short4: Hey {{name}} ✨ Usukulungele ukuqhubeka lapho esishiyele khona?
greetings.short6: O hey {{name}}! Unento entsha engqondweni yakho?

login.title: Qhubeka uye ku-Chatforia
login.ssoUnavailable: Ukubhalisa okukodwa okwamanje akwenzeki. Sebenzisa igama lomsebenzisi nephasiwedi esikhundleni salokho.

verification.sent: I-imeyili yokuqinisekisa ithunyelwe. Bheka i-inbox yakho.

error.unprocessable: Isicelo esingalungile. Hlola igama lakho lomsebenzisi/i-imeyili nephasiwedi yakho.
error.deviceLimit: Umkhawulo wamadivayisi usufinyelelwe kuhlelo lwamahhala. Phuma kwenye idivayisi noma uthuthukise uye ku-Premium ukuze uxhume amadivayisi amaningi.

forgotPassword.umsizi: Faka ikheli le-imeyili owalisebenzisile ukudala i-akhawunti yakho ye-Chatforia bese sikuthumelela isixhumanisi esiphephile sokubuyekeza iphasiwedi yakho.
forgotPassword.genericError: Akwenzeki ukucubungula isicelo. Sicela uzame futhi ngemva komzuzwana.
forgotPassword.sentHelper: Uma kune-akhawunti ekhona naleyo imeyili, sesithumele isixhumanisi sokubuyekeza iphasiwedi. Kungathatha imizuzu embalwa ukufika. Qiniseka ukuthi uhlole ifolda yakho ye-spam noma yezokuphromotha.

resetPassword.title: Sethusa Iphasiwedi
resetPassword.missingToken: Ithokheni yokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi ayilungile noma ayikho.
resetPassword.missingTokenHelper: Ithokheni ayilungile noma ayikho. Sicela ucele isixhumanisi esisha sokubuyisela iphasiwedi.
resetPassword.strongPasswordHint: Khetha i-password eqinile ongayisebenzisi kwenye indawo.

support.heading: Singakusiza kanjani?
support.contactIntro: Sizozama ukuxazulula lokhu ngokushesha. Uma kungenjalo, ithimba lethu lizolandela.
support.sendError: Akwenzekanga ukuthumela. Thumela i-imeyili ku-support@chatforia.com esikhundleni salokho.
support.actionFailed: Asikwazanga ukuqedela leso senzo. Sicela uzame futhi.
support.ticketCreated: Asikwazanga ukuxazulula lokhu ngokuzenzakalelayo. Ithimba lethu lizolandela.
support.escalationMessage: Asikwazanga ukuxazulula lokhu ngokuzenzakalelayo. Ithimba lethu lizolandela.
support.genericError: Kukhona okungahambi kahle. Sicela uzame futhi.

account.q: Ngingadala kanjani noma ngibuyisele kanjani i-akhawunti yami?
account.a: Landa uhlelo lokusebenza noma usebenzise iwebhu, thinta "Dala i-akhawunti", qinisekisa i-imeyili/inombolo yakho yocingo. Ukuze ubuyise i-akhawunti, sebenzisa "Ngikhohliwe iphasiwedi".

privacy.a: Yebo. Imilayezo nezingcingo zifihlwe kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni ngokujwayelekile. Nguwe kuphela nomamukeli ongakwazi ukuzifunda.

translate.a: Vumela "Auto-translate" ku-Settings → Appearance & Language. Sihumusha kudivayisi lapho sekuxhaswa khona, kungenjalo sisebenzisa ama-API avikelekile ane-metadata encane.

contact.a: Sithinte ku support@chatforia.com. Faka izithombe-skrini kanye nohlobo lwe-app yakho.

gettingStarted.title: Ukuqala
gettingStarted.subtitle: Usemusha eChatforia? Leli qalo elisheshayo likhombisa izinto eziyisisekelo ukuze ukwazi ukusebenza ngempumelelo ngemizuzu.

alert.text: Lomhlahlandlela uzokhula njengoba sisungula izici ezintsha. Uma kukhona okushodayo, sazise nge-

section1.title: 1) Dala i-akhawunti yakho
section1.prefsStart: Ku-app, vula Izilungiselelo ukuze usethe izintandokazi zakho

section2.title: 2) Qala ukuthumela imilayezo
section2.item1: Dala i-DM noma Iqembu bese uthumela umlayezo wakho wokuqala.
section2.item2: Sebenzisa ukuguqulwa ngokushesha ukuze uxoxe ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100.
section2.item3: Zama imilayezo ephunyayo nezitifiketi zokufunda ku-Profayela → Ubumfihlo.

section3.title: 3) Hamba phambili
section3.item1: Ungakwazi ukuthuthukisa uhlelo olukhokhelwayo noma kunini ngaphakathi kohlelo lokusebenza.
section3.item2: Uma usungenile, ungaxhuma amadivayisi angeziwe futhi usethe ukugcinwa kwedatha okuvikeliwe kusuka ku-Izilungiselelo kohlelo lokusebenza.
section3.item2Part1: Uma usungene, ungaxhuma eminye imishini futhi usethe ukugcinwa kwedatha okufihliwe kusuka kuzilungiselelo ku-app.

howItWorks.title: Indlela i-Chatforia Esisebenza Ngayo
howItWorks.intro: I-Chatforia yakhelwe ukwenza ukuxhumana kube lula, kusheshe, futhi kufinyeleleke. Ukuqala kuthatha izinyathelo ezimbalwa nje.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Bhalisa usebenzisa i-imeyili yakho noma igama lomsebenzisi ukuze udale i-akhawunti yakho ye-Chatforia.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Xhumana nabanye ngokukhetha abaxhumana nabo noma ukuqala izingxoxo ezintsha.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Imilayezo iletwa ngokushesha ukuze kunikezwe isipiliyoni sokuxhumana esibushelelezi.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Ukuhumusha okwakhelwe ngaphakathi kusiza abasebenzisi ukuxhumana ngezilimi ezahlukene.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Lawula izintandokazi zakho, abaxhumana nabo, nezilungiselelo zokuxhumana.

safety.title: Ukuvikeleka Nezindlela Zokuziphatha Zomphakathi
safety.intro: I-Chatforia izibophezele ekugcineni indawo ephephile nenhlonipho kubo bonke abasebenzisi. Lezi zindlela zokuziphatha zisiza ukuqinisekisa isipiliyoni esihle kubo bonke.
safety.respectDesc: Kulindeleke ukuthi abasebenzisi baxhumane ngokuhlonipha. Ukuhlukunyezwa, ukuxhatshazwa, noma ukuziphatha okubucayi akuvunyelwe.

amathuluzi.block: Vimba abasebenzisi ukuze uvimbele ukuxhumana okwengeziwe

safety.enforcementDesc: Singase sithathe izinyathelo maqondana nama-akhawunti aphula le mihlahlandlela, okuhlanganisa izixwayiso, izithiyo, noma ukususwa unomphela epulatifomu.

whyMessaging.title: Kungani Amapulatifomu Okuthumela Imiyalezo Ebaluleke Kakhulu Kunjalo
whyMessaging.intro: Amapulatifomu okuthumela imiyalezo sekuyizinsiza ezibaluleke kakhulu zokuxhumana emhlabeni wanamuhla. Kusukela ezingxoxweni zomuntu siqu kuya ebudlelwaneni bebhizinisi, izinhlelo zokuthumela imiyalezo zivumela abantu ukuthi bahlale bexhumene ngokushesha nangempumelelo.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Abantu bathembele kumasu lokuthumela imilayezo ukuze baxhumane nsuku zonke nabangane, umndeni, kanye nozakwabo. Noma ngabe kuwukwazisa okusheshayo noma ingxoxo ende, ukuthumela imilayezo kunikeza indlela elula futhi eguquguqukayo yokuhlala uxhumekile.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Enye yezinzuzo ezinkulu zama-platform wokuthumela imilayezo isivinini sawo. Imilayezo iletwa ngokushesha, ivumela abasebenzisi ukuba baxhumane ngesikhathi sangempela. Leli zinga lokunethezeka lenze ukuthumela imilayezo kube yindlela yokuxhumana ekhethwa abantu abaningi.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo axhumanisa abantu emhlabeni wonke. Ngenxa yokufinyelela ku-inthanethi, abasebenzisi bangakwazi ukuxhumana kungakhathalekile indawo abakhona, okwenza kube lula ukwakha ubudlelwano nokusebenzisana emazweni ngamazwe.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Amapulatifomu okuthumela imiyalezo zanamuhla agxile ekunikezeni abasebenzisi ukulawula idatha yabo nezingxoxo zabo. Izici ezifana nokufihla imininingwane (encryption), izilungiselelo zobumfihlo, nezilawuli zemiyalezo zivumela abasebenzisi ukuba baxhumane ngokuzethemba.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Ukuthumela imilayezo kuyaqhubeka nokuthuthuka ngezinye izici ezintsha ezifana nezimpendulo ezisebenzisa i-AI, ukuhumusha, nokwabelana ngemidiya ehlukahlukene. Njengoba ubuchwepheshe buqhubeka nokuthuthuka, amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo azoba namandla kakhulu futhi abe nokuguquguquka okwengeziwe.
whyMessaging.outro: I-Chatforia yakhiwe ngale migaqo engqondweni, inikeza isipiliyoni esheshayo, esiphephile, futhi isipiliyoni sokuthumela imiyalezo esilula somsebenzisi emhlabeni oxhumene.

global.title: Ikusasa Lokuxhumana Komhlaba Wonke
global.intro: Ukuxhumana sekushintshe ngokushesha emashumini eminyaka ambalwa edlule. Lokho okwakudinga izingcingo noma ngqo -imihlangano yomuntu nomuntu manje isingafezeka ngokushesha ngezinkundla zokuthumela imilayezo. Njengoba ubuchwepheshe buqhubeka nokuthuthuka, ukuxhumana emhlabeni wonke kuya kusiba ngokushesha, kufinyeleleka kalula, futhi kubandakanya wonke umuntu.
global.izithiyoDesc: Olunye lwezinguquko ezinkulu ekuxhumaneni ukuncishiswa kwezithiyo zendawo. Abantu manje bangaxhumana nabanye emhlabeni wonke cishe ngesikhathi sangempela. Noma ngabe izingxoxo zomuntu siqu, ibhizinisi, noma ukubambisana, izinkundla zokuthumela imilayezo zenze ibanga lingabi yisithiyo esikhulu kangako .
global.translationDesc: Ulimi ngokwesiko belulokhu luyisithiyo esikhulu kakhulu ekuxhumaneni komhlaba wonke. Namuhla, amathuluzi okuhumusha akhelwe ngaphakathi asiza ukuvala lelo banga. Amapulatifomu afana ne-Chatforia avumela abasebenzisi ukuba baxhumane kalula noma ngabe bakhuluma izilimi ezahlukene, edala amathuba amasha okuxhumana nokuqonda.
global.realtimeDesc: Ijubane liyisici esibalulekile esibumba ukuxhumana kwanamuhla. Abasebenzisi balindele ukuthi imilayezo ithunyelwe ngokushesha, futhi ingqalasizinda yanamuhla isekela lokho okulindelekile. Ukuthumela imilayezo ngesikhathi sangempela kuvumela izingxoxo zemvelo neziguquguqukayo.
global.privacyDesc: Njengoba ukuxhumana kuya kuba kwe-digital, ubumfihlo nokuphepha kuya kubaluleka kakhulu. Abasebenzisi bafuna ukuzethemba ukuthi izingxoxo zabo zivikelekile. Izici ezifana nokufihlwa kwemininingwane (encryption) nezilungiselelo ezilawulwa ngumsebenzisi zisiza ukunikeza isipiliyoni sokuxhumana esiphephile kakhulu.
global.futureDesc: Ikusasa lokuxhumana komhlaba wonke kungenzeka libe namathuluzi athuthukile, njengokuthumela imilayezo ngosizo lwe-AI, ukuguqulela okuthuthukisiwe, kanye nezipiliyoni zabasebenzisi ezithuthukisiwe. Njengoba ubuchwepheshe buqhubeka bukhula, ukuxhumana kuzoqhubeka kuba nokuqonda kalula futhi kufinyeleleke kalula.
global.outro: Amapulatifomu afana ne-Chatforia ayingxenye yalolu shintsho, asiza abantu baxhumane kalula ngaphezu kwezilimi nemingcele.

index.title: Ibhulogi ye-Chatforia
index.intro: Hlola ukuqonda ngokuxhumana, ukuphepha ku-inthanethi, nokuthi ubuchwepheshe bokuthumela imilayezo buxhumanisa kanjani abantu emhlabeni wonke.

chatSafely.title: Indlela Yokuxoxa Ngokuphepha Ku-inthanethi
chatSafely.intro: Ukuxhumana ku-inthanethi sekwenze kwaba lula kakhulu kunanini ukuhlangana nabantu emhlabeni wonke. Noma ngabe uthumela imilayezo kubangane, uhlangana nabantu abasha, noma usebenzisana ngobungcweti, amapulatifomu wokuthumela imilayezo adlala indima enkulu ekuphileni kwansuku zonke. Nokho, ukuhlala uphephile ku-inthanethi kubalulekile njengokuhlala uxhumekile.

personalInfo.title: Vikela Ulwazi Lwakho Lomuntu Siqu
personalInfo.body: Omunye wemithetho ebaluleke kakhulu yokuphepha ku-inthanethi wukugwema ukwabelana ngolwazi lomuntu siqu olubucayi. Lokhu kufaka ikheli lakho lasekhaya, imininingwane yezimali, amaphasiwedi, noma yiluphi ulwazi olungakusiza ukukuhlonza olungase lusetshenziswe kabi. Ngisho nasezingxoxweni ezijwayelekile, kungcono ukuqaphela ukuthi yini oyabelana ngayo nokuthi ubabelana nobani.

safetyFeatures.title: Sebenzisa Izici Zokuphepha Ezakhelwe Ngaphakathi
safetyFeatures.body: Amapulatifomu wanamuhla okuthumela imilayezo afana ne-Chatforia anikeza amathuluzi okusiza abasebenzisi bahlale bephephile. Izici ezifana nokuvimba, ukubika, nezilawuli zobumfihlo zakhelwe ukunikeza abasebenzisi ukulawula okuhlangenwe nakho kwabo. Uma othile ephatha ngendlela engafanele noma ekwenza ungakhululeki, kufanele usebenzise lawa mathuluzi ngokushesha.

izinkohliso.umzimba: Abakhohlisi bavame ukusebenzisa amapulatifomu okuthumela imiyalezo ukuze bakhohlise abasebenzisi ukuthi babelane ngolwazi lwabo siqu noma bathumele imali. Qaphela imiyalezo ebonakala ingcono kakhulu ukuze kube yiqiniso, njengeminikelo engalindelekile, izicelo eziphuthumayo, noma izixhumanisi ongaziqondi. Hlala uqinisekisa ubunikazi bomuntu okhuluma naye ngaphambi kokuthatha noma yiziphi izinyathelo.

responsibly.title: Xhumana Ngokuziphatha
responsibly.body: Ukuxhumana ngenhlonipho kusiza ukudala indawo ephephile kubo bonke. Gwema ukubamba iqhaza ezingxoxweni eziyingozi noma ezihlambalazayo, futhi uqaphele ukuthi amazwi akho angase athinte abanye kanjani. Ukuxhumana okuhle kunikela ekuhlangenwe nakho okungcono kubo bonke abasebenzisi.

whySafety.title: Kungani Ukuvikeleka Ku-inthanethi Kubalulekile
whySafety.body: Njengoba ukuxhumana kwedijithali kuqhubeka kukhula, ukugcina ukuphepha nokwethenjwa kuba kubaluleke kakhulu. Ngokulandela izindlela eziyisisekelo zokuphepha nokusebenzisa amathuluzi atholakalayo, abasebenzisi bangajabulela izinzuzo zokuthumela imiyalezo ngenkathi banciphisa ubungozi.

chatSafely.ukuphetha: Ukuhlala uphephile ku-inthanethi akudingi ulwazi lobuchwepheshe olujulile—kudinga ukuqaphela, ukucophelela, nokwahlulela okuhle. Ngezindlela ezifanele, ungakwazi ukuxhumana ngokuzethemba nangokuphepha.

ngokwe.incazelo: I-Chatforia iyinhlelo yokuthumela imiyalezo ephephile, ekhuluma izilimi eziningi enokufihlwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni (E2E), ukuhumusha ngokushesha, kanye nokubiza ngomsindo/ividiyo. Inhloso yethu ilula: ukusiza abantu baxhumane—ngokuphepha, ngasese, nangaphezu kwezilimi.

values.privacy: Ukuvikelwa kwemfihlo kuqala: Ukuvalwa kwemilayezo kusukela ekuqaleni (E2E) ngokujwayelekile.
values.access: Ukufinyelela kubo bonke: Ukuguqulela ngokuzenzakalelayo izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100.
values.control: Ukulawula: Imilayezo ephumayo kanye nezitifiketi zokufunda aziyona impoqo.
values.privacy_ aria: Ukuvikelwa kwemfihlo kuqala: Ukubethela kwe-E2E ngokujwayelekile.
values.access_aria: Ukufinyelela kubo bonke: Ukuguqulela ngokuzenzakalelayo izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100.

ngokwe.howDescription: Imilayezo ifihlwe kumadivayisi akho ngaphambi kokuba iphume kuwo. Ukuhumusha, ukugcinwa kwedatha, nokuvumelanisa amadivayisi kuhlelwe ukunciphisa lokho iziphakeli zethu ezingakubona.

press.title: Press
press.boilerplateBody: I-Chatforia uhlelo lokuthumela imiyalezo oluqala ngobumfihlo olwenza ukuxoxa phakathi kwezilimi kube lula. Imiyalezo ivikelwe ngokuphelele kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni ngokujwayelekile, futhi ukuguqulwa okwakhelwe ngaphakathi kusekela izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100 ngesikhathi sangempela. Abasebenzisi bangavumela imiyalezo ephunyayo, bagcine izitholi zokufunda ziyinketho, futhi bahlanganise amadivayisi. Iyatholakala ku-iOS, Android, nakuwebhu.
press.scanTip: Kudeskithophu? Skena ngocingo lwakho ukuze uthole uhlelo lokusebenza.

careers.title: Imisebenzi
careers.intro: Siyithimba elincane elisungulayo elakha i-Chatforia — umlayezo wangasese womhlaba wonke ozosethulwa kuwebhu, ku-iOS, naku-Android. Uma ukhathalela ubumfihlo, ukufihlwa kwemininingwane, kanye nezipiliyoni zabasebenzisi ezimnandi, singathanda ukuzwa ngawe.
careers.openRoles: Izikhala zokusungula ezivulekile: Umholi we-Full-stack Engineer, i-Backend Engineer (Node.js), i-Frontend/ Umkhandi weWebhu (React), Umkhandi weSelfoni (iOS), Umkhandi weSelfoni (Android), Umkhandi we-DevOps/SRE, Umkhandi Wezokuphepha Nokufihla Imfihlo, Umkhandi Wezokuxhumana (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Ungafaka kanjani isicelo: Sebenzisa inkinobho engezansi ukuthumela i-imeyili neresume yakho nezixhumanisi.
careers.whyBullets:
• Siza ukwakha isisekelo somlayezo omusha womhlaba wonke.
• Thumela izithuthukisi ezisetshenziswa kuwebhu, iOS, ne-Android.
• Sebenza ngqo nomsunguli ekwakhiweni nasekuqondiseni umkhiqizo.
• Bamba izindawo ezinethonya elikhulu ku-stack: ukuthumela imilayezo, izwi, ividiyo, ukufihla imininingwane, ezokuxhumana, i-AI.
• Joyina ekuqaleni — ngaphambi kokuba inani labasebenzisi likhule.

advertise.title: Khangisa ne-Chatforia
advertise.description: Finyelela kubasebenzisi abathumela imilayezo abazibophezele ngokubeka izikhangiso ezinhle, eziphephile kumkhiqizo. Sinikeza izikhangiso zebhana ezindaweni ezibonakala kakhulu, izixhaso, kanye nezikhangiso zangaphakathi. Ababhalisele i-Premium ababoni izikhangiso.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Siphinde sinikeze izikhangiso nge-Google AdSense. Ungaqondisa i-Chatforia nge-ID yomshicileli {{pub Id}}, noma usebenzise ifomu elingezansi ukuthola ukuxhaswa ngokuqondile.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Siphinde sinikeze ezinye izikhangiso nge-Google AdSense. Ukuxhaswa ngokuqondile kuyatholakala—sebenzisa ifomu elingezansi.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Sisafinaliza isitoko sethu sezikhangiso. Sitshele ngomkhankaso wakho futhi sizoncoma izindawo zokubeka.

why.highSession: Inani eliphezulu lezikhathi zokuxoxa kanye nesikhathi eside sokuhlala ku-UI yokuxoxa
why.brandSafe: Izinhlobo eziphephile kubhrendi; ukulinganiselwa kwesibalo ngenhlonipho
why.sponsoredMoments: Izikhathi ezixhaswayo (isb., i-modal ethi "Qala Ingxoxo") ziyatholakala
why.deals: Izivumelwano eziqondile noma ezihlelwayo nge-AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Ngiyabonga! Isicelo sakho sesithunyelwe. Sizobuya ngokushesha.
form.mailtoInfo: Sivula uhlelo lwakho lwe-imeyili ukuthumela isicelo…

xhumana.errorSend: Akukwazanga ukuthumela. Sicela uthumele i-imeyili ku-support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Le Nqubomgomo Yobumfihlo ichaza ukuthi i-Chatforia ("thina", "kithi") siqoqa, sisebenzisa, futhi sabelane ngolwazi lapho usebenzisa izinhlelo zethu zokusebenza nezinsizakalo. Sakha i-Chatforia ukuze sinciphise idatha esingayifinyelela.

infoWeCollect.title: Ulwazi esiluqoqayo
infoWeCollect.akhawunti: Ulwazi lwe-akhawunti (isb., i-imeyili/inombolo yocingo) ukuze kwakhiwe futhi kuvikelwe i-akhawunti yakho.
infoWeCollect.okufihliwe: Okuqukethwe okufihliwe (imiyalezo/izingcingo) kufihlwe kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni; asikwazi ukukufunda.
infoWeCollect.ukuxilonga: Ukuxilonga/ukusetshenziswa njengezilogi zokuwa, uhlobo lwedivayisi, noma ukuhlaziywa okujwayelekile ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukusebenza.

sms.title: Amanombolo weselula nama-SMS
sms.body: Uma ukhetha ukunikeza inombolo yocingo yeselula, siyisebenzisa ukuvumela izici ezifana nokuqinisekisa i-akhawunti, izaziso zokungena, nokuthumela imilayezo kusuka kumsebenzisi kuya kumsebenzisi nge-SMS lapho sekuxhaswa khona. Singathumela imilayezo ye-SMS yokuthengiselana ehlobene ne-akhawunti yakho nemisebenzi yakho ku-Chatforia. Ungakhetha ukungatholi imilayezo ye-SMS noma kunini noma yisiphi isikhathi ngokuphendula ngegama elisekelwayo lokuphuma (njenge-"STOP") noma ngokushintsha izintandokazi zakho zezaziso kuhlelo lokusebenza. Asidayisi inombolo yakho yocingo noma siyisebenzisele ukumaketha okungahlangene.

howWeUse.title: Indlela esisebenzisa ngayo imininingwane
howWeUse.provide: Hlinzeka futhi uvikeleke ngesevisi (ukuqinisekisa ubunikazi, ukutholwa kwe-spam/ukusetshenziswa kabi).

sharing.title: Ukwabelana
sharing.body: Asidayisi imininingwane yakho siqu. Singabelana ngemininingwane ethile nabacubunguli (isb., izaziso zokupush, ukuhlaziywa kwedatha) ngaphansi kwezivumelwano eziqinile.

amalungelo.title: Amalungelo akho
amalungelo.body: Kuncike esifundeni sakho (isb., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), ungacela ukufinyelela, ukulungisa, ukususa, noma ukuphuma ekucubungulweni okuthile. Xhumana: privacy@chatforia.com.

ukugcinwa.title: Ukugcinwa kwedatha nokuphepha
ukugcinwa.body: Sigcina kuphela lokho okudingekayo ukuze sisebenze insiza futhi sisebenzise izindinganiso zokuphepha zemboni. Okuqukethwe kwe-E2E akukwazi ukuvulwa kithi.

children.title: Izingane
children.body: I-Chatforia ayihloselwe izingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-13 (noma njengoba kudingeka ngumthetho wendawo yakho).

izinguquko.umzimba: Sizothumela izibuyekezo lapha futhi sibuyekeze usuku oluthi "Okubuyekezwe okokugcina".

contact.title: Xhumana nathi
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Ngokusebenzisa i-Chatforia uyavuma le Miqathango. Uma ungavumelani, ungayisebenzisi insiza.

ama-akhawunti.itemAccurateInfo: Nikeza imininingwane eqondile futhi ugcine izitifiketi zakho ziphephile.

acceptableUse.title: Ukusetshenziswa okwamukelekayo
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Akukho okuqukethwe okungekho emthethweni, okudlulele, noma okuphulayo; akukho spam noma ukusetshenziswa ngokuzenzakalelayo okungekho emthethweni.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: Singase simise noma siqede ukusebenza ngenxa yokwephulwa.

sms.title: Ukuxhumana nge-SMS
sms.body: Uma unikeza inombolo yocingo ephathekayo, uyavuma ukuthi i-Chatforia ingakuthumelela imilayezo ye-SMS ehlobene ne-akhawunti yakho nokusetshenziswa kwesevisi, njengokwaziswa kokungena, izaziso zokuphepha, nemilayezo ehlobene nezingxoxo ozisungulayo noma ozihilelayo. Asisebenzisi i-SMS ukuthumela imilayezo yokuphromotha noma yokumaketha ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacile. Izimali ezijwayelekile zemilayezo nedatha zingase zisebenze. Ungakhetha ukungatholi imilayezo ye-SMS imiyalezo ye-SMS nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngokuphendula ngegama eliyinhloko lokuphuma (isb., "STOP") noma ngokuvuselela izilungiselelo zakho zezaziso ku-app.

yourContent.title: Okuqukethwe kwakho
yourContent.body: Ugcina amalungelo okuqukethwe kwakho. Usinika amalungelo adingekayo ukuze sisebenzise insiza (isb., ukuhambisa, ukugcina, ukuhumusha).

disclaimer.title: Izitatimende Zokungabi Nezibopho Nokubophezeleka
disclaimer.body: Isevisi inikezwa "njengoba injalo" ngaphandle kweziqinisekiso. Ngokugcwele okuvunyelwe ngumthetho, iChatforia ayibophekile ekubhekaneni nokulimala okungaqondile noma okubangelwa ngemiphumela.

changes.title: Izinguquko
changes.body: Singavuselela le mibandela; ukuqhubeka nokusebenzisa ngemva kwezinguquko kusho ukwamukela.

contact.title: Xhumana Nathi
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

refund.title: Inqubomgomo Yokubuyiselwa Imali
refund.intro: E-Chatforia, sizama ukuhlinzeka ngesevisi esezingeni eliphezulu kubo bonke abasebenzisi. Le Nqubomgomo Yokubuyiselwa Imali ichaza ukuthi imali ingabuyiselwa nini.

subscriptions.title: Izibhaliso
subscriptions.body: Izibhaliso zikhokhiswa kusengaphambili ngokuphindaphindiwe. Ungakukhansela noma kunini ngokusebenzisa izilungiselelo ze-akhawunti yakho noma ipulatifomu esetshenziselwe ukuthenga.

eligibility.umzimba: Ama-refund angase anikezwe izindleko eziphindwe kabili, amaphutha okukhokhisa, noma izinkinga zobuchwepheshe ezivimbela ukufinyelela ezici ezikhokhelwayo. Zonke izicelo ziyabuyekezwa ngokwezimo.

okungabuyiselwa.umzimba: Ngokuvamile asinikezi ama-refund ngesikhathi esingasetshenziswanga, izikhathi zokubhalisa ezingaphelele, noma ukwehluleka ukukhansela ngaphambi kokuvuselelwa.

thirdParty.title: Ukuthenga Kwesithathu
thirdParty.body: Uma kuthengiwe ngezinye izinkundla ezifana ne-Apple App Store, izicelo zokubuyiselwa imali kumele zenziwe ngqo kulezo zinkundla.

contact.title: Xhumana Nathi
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 8280 1, USA

doNotSell.title: Ungathengisi noma Wabelane Ngemininingwane Yami Yomuntu Siqu
doNotSell.body: I-Chatforia ayithengisi imininingwane yomuntu siqu. Abahlali baseCalifornia bangaqhubeka nokufaka izicelo ngaphansi kwe-CPRA besebenzisa inkinobho engezansi.

cookies.title: Izilungiselelo Zama-cookie
cookies.body: I-Chatforia isebenzisa ama-cookie amancane (isb., seshini, ukuphepha). Asisebenzisi ama-cookie wokukhangisa avela kwabanye. Lawula ama-cookie ngezilungiselelo zebhrawuza yakho.

whatWeSend.title: Okuthunyelwayo kithi
whatWeSend.body: I-Chatforia ithumela kuphela ama-SMS ahlobene ne-akhawunti nawokuxoxa kumanombolo weselula umsebenzisi awahlinzekile ngokusobala futhi avumile. Imilayezo ejwayelekile ifaka amakhodi okungena/okuqinisekisa, izaziso zokulethwa kwemilayezo, izaziso zokuphepha, nezibuyekezo ze-akhawunti zokuthengiselana.

optIn.title: Indlela abasebenzisi abangena ngayo
optIn.body: Abasebenzisi bangena ngokufaka inombolo yabo yocingo ngesikhathi sokubhalisa nokuhlola ibhokisi lokuvuma i-SMS ekhasini lokubhalisa noma kufomu elikhethekile lokungena

optOut.title: Indlela abasebenzisi abaphuma ngayo
optOut.stop: Phendula STOP kunoma iyiphi i-SMS ye-Chatforia ukuze ukhethe ukuphuma.

help.title: Usizo
help.bodyPrefix: Phendula HELP ukuze uthole usizo noma i-imeyili

privacyTerms.title: Imigomo Yobumfihlo Nezokusebenzisa
privacyTerms.bodyStart: Ngokuvuma i-SMS, abasebenzisi bavuma futhi imigomo yethu
